categories.name: Sales
categories.description_prefix: Supports revenue teams by coordinating follow-up, account planning, and forecasting work.

categories.description_prefix: Helps support teams route urgent cases, summarize customer context, and maintain response quality.

categories.description_prefix: Assists security teams with evidence gathering, access review, and incident response workflows.

categories.name: Data
categories.description_prefix: Enables data teams to validate inputs, map schemas, and automate quality checks.

categories.name: DevOps
categories.description_prefix: Improves release, infrastructure, and runbook workflows for platform teams.

categories.name: Finance
categories.description_prefix: Streamlines finance approvals, reconciliations, and planning operations.

categories.name: HR
categories.description_prefix: Supports onboarding, policy search, and internal people operations workflows.

categories.name: Research
categories.description_prefix: Helps research teams gather sources, organize findings, and prepare evidence-backed summaries.

categories.name: Knowledge
categories.description_prefix: Organizes workspace knowledge, documentation updates, and retrieval workflows.

categories.name: QA
categories.description_prefix: Coordinates release validation, regression planning, and defect triage for quality teams.
